description: CompositionDark blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, fabric tape detailing on inseam of a softly ribbed neckline, graphic print detailing on the front with lettering, and brand tab appliqued on the left sleeveFittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash inside out with like colours in warm water at 40 C Use mild detergentDo not scrub, bleach, tumble dry or wringDry inside out in shadeWarm iron inside outDo not iron directly on print/embroideryDo not dry clean If high-rise buildings are your passion, this dark blue tee from s.oliver will suit you perfectly. With a great image of sky scrapers on the front in eye-catching colors, and the soft feel of cotton against your skin, you can't ask for a better t-shirt! Pair it with jeans, shorts or cargos, and look super cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
